scripts.build: npm run clean && npm run build -w packages/core && npm run build -w packages/data && npm run build -w packages/providers && npm run build -w packages/agents && npm run build -w packages/workflows && npm run build -w packages/reports && npm run build -w packages/worker && npm run build -w packages/server && npm run build -w apps/web && node scripts/copy-web-to-server.js
